sections.label: Verse 1
lines: In silence I carried my burden alone
The weight of my secrets turned my heart into stone
But when I finally opened my soul to the light
You washed away darkness and made everything right

sections.label: Chorus
lines: You are my shelter, my refuge in storms
When waves crash around me, Your love keeps me warm
In You I find freedom, my spirit renewed
No shame, no hiding, just grace flowing through

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Like rivers of mercy flowing down from above
You covered my failings with infinite love
No longer condemned by the things I had done
In Your arms of forgiveness, a new life has begun

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Teaching me wisdom
Guiding my way
Your hand upon me
Each step, every day

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Now I sing with joy from a heart that is free
Celebrating the love that has rescued me
Among all the faithful, I'll lift up my voice
In Your endless mercy, I'll forever rejoice

sections.label: Chorus
lines: You are my shelter, my refuge in storms
When waves crash around me, Your love keeps me warm
In You I find freedom, my spirit renewed
No shame, no hiding, just grace flowing through

sections.label: Outro
lines: In Your perfect love, I am home
